::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
```{=latex}
    \pagestyle{plain} 
    \setcounter{page}{1}
    \begin{center}
        {\Large Math {{< var course.number >}}: {{< var course.name >}}} \\[0.5em]
        {\large Professor {{< var instructor.name >}}}
    \end{center}
    
    \vspace{1.5cm}

    \noindent
    \begin{minipage}{0.65\textwidth}
    \textbf{Name}:\ \hrulefill
    \end{minipage}
    \hfill
    \begin{minipage}{0.30\textwidth}
    \textbf{Date}:\ \hrulefill
    \end{minipage}
    \bigskip
```
:::
::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="60%"}
**Name:** ________________________
:::
::: {.column width="30%" layout-align="right"}
**Date:** ________________________
:::
::::
:::

<br>

[GRADETABLE]

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
```{=latex}
    \vspace{-1mm}
    \rule{\textwidth}{1pt}
```
:::

<br>

**You are responsible for following the instructions below:**

+ **Write neatly, box answers, and show work.** I want to give you partial credit if possible!

+ **Do not refer to calculators, computational engines, or other outside resources.** You may use results proved in previous homework, the Lecture Notes, or class unless otherwise stated. If you are asked to prove a statement in the exam, you are free to use it in subsequent problems (e.g., if problem 2c asks you to demonstrate a lemma that you could then use to solve part 3b, you may do so freely even if you are unable to complete the proof of 2c).

+ **Do not discuss the exam with anyone before it is due.**

+ **Do not share copies of the exam for any reason.**

Good luck!

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
```{=latex}
    \vspace{-2mm}
    \noindent \rule{\textwidth}{1pt}
```
:::
::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
***
<br>
:::

*I agree to these conditions and furthermore I understand that failing to follow these instructions (e.g., by using or accessing disallowed resources, sharing exam materials, etc.) is a violation of academic integrity as defined within the Carleton College student handbook:* `https://apps.carleton.edu/handbook/`.

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
```{=latex}
    \bigskip
```
:::
::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
<br>
:::

*On my honor, I have neither received or given unauthorized assistance on this examination!*

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
```{=latex}
    \vfill
    \vfill
```
:::
::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
<br>
:::

**Signature:** ________________________

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
```{=latex}
    \bigskip
```
:::

{{< pagebreak >}}
